# DINO 检测环境 (GroundingDINO)
# 创建: conda create -n cr-dino python=3.10 -y && conda activate cr-dino
# 安装 GroundingDINO 见 env/requirements/README.md

torch>=2.0
torchvision
transformers>=4.30,<5.0
opencv-python-headless
pillow
numpy
tqdm
supervision
addict
yapf
timm

# GroundingDINO 需单独 clone 并编译 CUDA 扩展:
# git clone https://github.com/IDEA-Research/GroundingDINO.git
# cd GroundingDINO && pip install -r requirements.txt
# pip install -e .   # 或 export PYTHONPATH=$PWD
